name: video-template-toaster-rocket-jumpscare
title: Toaster Rocket Jumpscare
description: A prompt for a realistic home-video style shot of an old man being jumpscared by a toaster launching bread like a rocket.

query.en: A realistic shot of an old man in a cozy kitchen being jumpscared when his toaster launches the bread five feet into the air like a rocket. Handheld "home video" style capturing his genuine look of shock and the bread hitting the ceiling.A realistic shot of an old man in a cozy kitchen being jumpscared when his toaster launches the bread five feet into the air like a rocket. Handheld "home video" style capturing his genuine look of shock and the bread hitting the ceiling.
